boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on assay-acceptance status
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-FJO-086 pending retest; STD-FJO-086 requires acceptance status
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release date met but acceptance pending

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. Source record CLOSE-FJO-086 indicates that the retest result for assay acceptance is still pending, despite matching the batch, assay, criterion, and release date. Policy STD-FJO-086 explicitly requires verified assay acceptance status before shipment. Therefore, the source boundary remains open due to this unresolved dependency.
